---
title: "Statistics lectures"
author: "Andy P. Field"
format: 
  html:
    title-block-banner: "#7B67A2"
    toc: true
    toc_float: true
    embed-resources: true
    theme: [helpers/discovr_access.scss]
---

## Discovering Statistics lectures

1. [The SPINE of statistics: The linear model, parameters and estimation]()
2. [The SPINE of statistics: standard error and confidence intervals]() 
3. [The SPINE of statistics: NHST]()
4. [Model fit and multiple predictors]()
5. [The beast of bias](ds_05_bias/ds_bias.html)
6. [Categorical predictors: comparing means]()
7. [Contrast coding]()
8. [Adjusting means]()
9. [Factorial designs]()
10. [Repeated measures designs]()
11. [Mixed designs]()
12. [Categorical outcomes]() 

## An adventure in Statistics lectures

1. [The SPINE of statistics: The linear model, parameters and estimation]()
2. [The SPINE of statistics: standard error and confidence intervals]() 
3. [The SPINE of statistics: NHST]()
4. [Beyond significance testing]() 
5. [Model fit and multiple predictors]()
6. [The beast of bias](ais_06_bias/ais_bias.html)
7. [Categorical predictors: comparing means]() 
8. [Contrast coding]() 
9. [Adjusting means]() 
10. [Factorial designs]()
11. [Multilevel models](ais_11_mlm/mlm.html)
12. [Repeated measures as a multilevel model](ais_12_rm_designs/repeated_measures_lme.html) 
13. [Growth models]() 
14. [Categorical outcomes]()

## Misc

- [Getting started in R, RStudio and R Markdown]()
- [Meta-analysis: overview](meta_analysis/meta_intro.html)
